payments.title: Payment History
payments.subtitle: Your bookings, wallet, and payment records
payments.signInRequired: Please sign in to view your payment history.
payments.refundSubmitted: Refund request submitted successfully. You will be notified once it is reviewed.
payments.noPaymentsDesc: You have no payment records yet.
payments.escrowPoint1: 50% of your booking amount is held securely in escrow on payment.
payments.escrowPoint2: Funds are released to the vendor 48 hours after your event is completed.
payments.escrowPoint3: If there is a dispute, funds are held until resolved by our support team.

wallet.title: My Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Balance, credits, and transaction history
wallet.signInRequiredDesc: Please sign in to view your wallet.
wallet.walletDeactivated: This wallet has been deactivated. Contact support for assistance.
wallet.noTransactionsDesc: Your wallet activity will appear here.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: GST-compliant invoices for your bookings and orders
invoices.noInvoicesDesc: Invoices are generated when a booking or order is confirmed.

refunds.title: Refund History
refunds.subtitle: Track the status of your refund requests
refunds.noRefundsDesc: You have not submitted any refund requests.

success.heading: Payment successful
success.message: Your transaction has been recorded. Thank you.

failure.heading: Payment failed
failure.defaultMessage: Your payment could not be completed.
failure.reassurance: No money has been deducted. If your bank shows a charge, it will reverse within 5–7 business days.
